rule CDB_AWS_Security_Hub_is_expanding_to_unify_s {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for AWS Security Hub is expanding to unify security operations across multicloud env"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-12"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
